new_terms.context: A study on PTX and SASS instructions to discover hardware throughput limits.
Parallel Thread Execution; Nvidia's intermediate assembly language.
Streaming Assembler; the low-level machine code that runs on Nvidia GPUs.
Unified Matrix Multiply-Accumulate; a specific instruction type in the Blackwell architecture.
Graphics Processing Cluster; used in the context of GPC Floorsweeps.
Streaming Multiprocessor; used in the context of SM Yield.
A popular deep learning library for inference kernels.
